  "complexity_notes": "A well-structured FastAPI application implementing a project management system with JWT authentication, SQLAlchemy async ORM for database operations, WebSocket support for real-time updates, and background task processing. Features include CRUD operations on projects with pagination and filtering, user authentication, and a connection manager for broadcasting messages to WebSocket clients. The code demonstrates good separation of concerns with models, schemas, and route handlers."
